stemHtml: You execute a TCAS RA climb. Before you can report to ATC, another aircraft transmits a MAYDAY. What should your crew do?

options.a: Wait because the other aircraft transmitted first.
options.b: Interrupt the distress call since ATC must be informed of your RA immediately.
options.c: Wait until the distress message concludes before transmitting, as distress has priority.
options.d: Wait because you are now clear of conflict and your situation is resolved.
